title: 仰げば尊死！　幽体離脱！？

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Where am I? I was on school grounds until
just a second ago...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, looks like I have the place to myself. This is
a good chance for me to run some experiments
without any restraints.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Tachyon?! I am so sorry to intrude, but... I'm
actually here as well!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What's this? My instruments are picking up an
unusual amount of static electricity... However, as
far as I know, there are no organisms in the
vicinity capable of causing interference.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... Tachyooon? Wait... Can you not see me?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: You're just messing around, right? Uh, w-wait wait!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I d-dunno what's going on exactly, but does this
mean I can spy on my oshis with no risk of getting
in the way?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh my freakin' GOSH! I need to go right now! I
need to hurry and get oshi watching like now!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! This is something else! My legs feel so
light—like I'm floating! Woohoo! I'm running
through the sky!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I've danced myself out! This flame... It's like my heart is burning my muscles with the blazing heat of hell—oxygen and fat alight all around me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! They really can't see me! I can't believe
I'm actually not bothering them!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
La la la! ♪ Drink and be drank! ♪ Teary
Umamusume! ♪ Running North, la la la! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Kekeke. Humming to herself in the classroom
after school! And it's so cuuute she doesn't know
all the words! Oh, we've got a winner!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeeees! This is the absolute best! Now, who
should I spy on nex—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyagh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh... Trainer? What the heck are you doing
here?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, that's right... The Horsegirl I passed by was so
cute I lost control of my breathing, and...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(N-no way... Was she so divine that I passed out
and... had an out-of-body experience?!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (Sigh... Wow! That was the absolute coolest.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(And I still remember how it felt running through
the sky... Oh! Actually, I think I can put that to
use in a race!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Don't worry, I'm fine. But... get ready to see
something awesome next race!
